name: Techlott Inc.
business: We are developing a blockchain-based technology platform designed to support lottery and gaming operations through a combination of smart contract infrastructure, verifiable randomness, and modular backend systems. We provide a range of technology products and services designed to support licensed lottery operators. We currently have one active customer operating on our platform and are in the process of expanding our commercial activity.
sellsTo: licensed operators in regulated or emerging markets

exposures.sentence: We are developing a blockchain-based technology platform designed to support lottery and gaming operations through a combination of smart contract infrastructure, verifiable randomness, and modular backend systems.
